---
page-layout: full
toc: false
---
::: {.contact-title}

# Contact

:::

::: {.contact-content}

Based in the United States, I welcome inquiries regarding research collaborations, consulting opportunities, policy analysis, and speaking engagements.

📧 **Email:** <a href="mailto:diana.floresperegrina@gmail.com">diana.floresperegrina@gmail.com</a>

:::
